steps.title: Identify the structural signal
steps.content: The underlined portion is enclosed in parentheses immediately after the word 'microfilm'—a standard textual signal that a definition is coming.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: The underlined portion explains what 'microfilm' means, restating an unfamiliar term in simpler language. The other choices describe functions not performed in the passage. That matches choice B — B is correct.
